{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321131907D8C05425EE5796E365CA"}"},"total":2655},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7277178728513028904","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的一本书，我还没有看完，作者构思巧妙，案件情节跌宕起伏，人性的真实反映。没有灵异元素、没有过度血腥吸引眼球，每一个案件都讲述着世间百态，警察也是人也有不足，惩恶扬善是宗旨。写得很棒，真怕看完了没得看，期待有更多的作品。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1694351218,"group_id":"7246701907723422758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxg0ZfRVw4rEcZl+qfpjH/lsGUHm/SjSsLQxtqCT55Ni","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4136791424378956","user_name":"技高一筹的李灵黛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4136791424378956","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246701907723422758","book_info":{"abstract":"[悬疑小说+刑侦+暗黑+恐怖+人性+犯罪+连环凶杀+社会事件]
本作品为《凶案密码》系列合集，包含《凶案密码》《死亡回声》《既得利益》《黑尸谜案》《无眠凶岛》五部作品。
闹市碎尸、地窖囚犯、都市悬疑再起，老警察亲解凶案之谜。
刑侦技术流小说经典之作！ 都市罪恶疑云密布，老警察亲解凶案之谜。商业街碎尸惊现、豪车中女主持被一刀割喉、美丽山村地狱囚奴……退休的老刑警临危受命，一桩桩离奇凶案真相大白之日，却是老刑警痛不欲生之时……
一部节奏明快、情节跌宕起伏的刑侦技术流小说，欢迎您品读！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/948c4465ac5cd85e69d32f8602348cc4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"风舞残云","author_id":"","book_id":"7246701907723422758","book_name":"凶案密码","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102038","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"390.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595169162549267518","read_count":"54471","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2265767"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"255","tags":"悬疑灵异,精品小说,悬疑推理,悬疑,推理,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/948c4465ac5cd85e69d32f8602348cc4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254347&x-signature=p9HN%2BRkogVg6ft1bbRxVi0zgDBk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0052522e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321131907D8C05425EE5796E365CA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读102小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":358132,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":368184,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":58990},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7290431890984108819","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的一部破案小说，主人公通过细致观察、缜密推理，总是能拨云见雾。相对于主人公的感情生活描写的能分清重点，并不会出现影响破案主线的情况。不足之处，似乎作者对其他刑警的认识不是很好，基本出现在主人公周围的刑警都是些酒囊饭袋。[捂脸][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697437753,"group_id":"7246701907723422758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嗯…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+cMF0kbcF2rh38Ah4Uvsk0wgyltrLZnFTncHurVKHUw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2664841111158635","user_name":"一个胖子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2664841111158635","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246701907723422758","book_info":{"abstract":"[悬疑小说+刑侦+暗黑+恐怖+人性+犯罪+连环凶杀+社会事件]

:{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":232082,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":325348,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":18620},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7284443870669882124","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事跌宕起伏，人物性格明确。在案子面前通过胆大心细，结合现场分析出当事人的情况，现场模拟凶手当时的情况，分析出凶手犯罪的全部过程。看过以后能够让读者将线索串起来，虽然一章有好几个案子，但是作者思路清晰，每个案子都有关键词，让读者一下子明白。
   最喜欢“国强”的一句话：你只看到树，没有看到种树的人。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696043488,"group_id":"7246701907723422758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5W4PptKOCWNeJmLK23zuAE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"954012977070819","user_name":"牛逼牛逼的庞弗雷夫人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"954012977070819","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7246701907723422758","book_info":{"abstract":"[悬疑小说+刑侦+暗黑+恐怖+人性+犯罪+连环凶杀+社会事件]
